## LibraryData.normalizeFileSources() function

Normalizes a file sources parameter to an array.

Accepts either a single source or an array of sources, and always returns a readonly array.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function normalizeFileSources<T extends {
    readonly directory: FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem;
}>(sources: T | ReadonlyArray<T> | undefined): ReadonlyArray<T>;
```
